description_long: This is a single-story bungalow with a modern, rectangular layout and a flat roof. The exterior walls are primarily white with sections of gray, and large windows dominate the main living area, allowing for ample natural light. The interior is divided into multiple rooms, including a visible living area with furniture, a kitchen, and bedrooms, all accessible via interior doors. There is a small entryway protruding from one side, and a partially enclosed patio or balcony area is visible at the rear. The structure appears to be constructed mainly from concrete or masonry, with glass windows and wooden interior elements. The overall design is clean and functional, suitable for an urban residential neighborhood.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with white and gray exterior walls, large windows, and a flat roof. The layout features multiple rooms, a small entryway, and a rear patio area.
description_view_0: This view highlights the main entryway and a large section of the white and gray exterior walls, with the patio area partially visible at the back.
description_view_1: This side view shows the living area with visible furniture and windows, as well as the extended gray wall enclosing part of the patio.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals the large glass windows of the main living area and the blue-tinted patio enclosure, with interior room divisions visible.
description_view_3: This angle displays the length of the bungalow, the rear patio, and the arrangement of rooms, with a focus on the side and back walls.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped large windows at the rear
